playbooks.yaml_content:
version: 2026-07-08.060450
policies:
- id: payment_terms
  label: Payment terms
  clause_type: payment_terms
  required: true
  risk_weight: 4
  cuad_map: Payment Terms
- id: limitation_of_liability
  label: Limitation of liability
  clause_type: limitation_of_liability
  required: true
  risk_weight: 5
  cuad_map: Cap On Liability
- id: term_and_termination
  label: Term & termination
  clause_type: term_and_termination
  required: false
  risk_weight: 3
  cuad_map: Expiration Date
- id: confidentiality
  label: Confidentiality
  clause_type: confidentiality
  required: false
  risk_weight: 3
  cuad_map: Non-Compete
- id: indemnification
  label: Indemnification
  clause_type: indemnification
  required: false
  risk_weight: 4
  cuad_map: null
- id: ip_ownership
  label: IP ownership & licensing
  clause_type: ip_ownership
  required: false
  risk_weight: 5
  cuad_map: License Grant
- id: governing_law
  label: Governing law
  clause_type: governing_law
  required: false
  risk_weight: 2
  cuad_map: null
service_lines:
- id: general_supplier
  label: General (supplier)
  side: supplier
  positions:
    payment_terms:
      id: PT-GEN-SUP-1
      preferred: Net 30 from invoice
      fallback: Net 15–45 from invoice
      walk_away: Payment on delivery or prepayment required
      risk_weight: 4
      source_doc_ids: []
    limitation_of_liability:
      id: LL-GEN-SUP-1
      preferred: Cap = 12 months fees; carve-outs for IP, confidentiality, fraud
      fallback: Cap 12–24 months fees with same carve-outs
      walk_away: Uncapped liability, cap below 6 months fees, or liability that sweeps
        in consequential/indirect/punitive damages
      risk_weight: 5
      source_doc_ids: []
    term_and_termination:
      id: TT-GEN-SUP-1
      preferred: 1-year term, auto-renew, 30-day written termination for convenience
      fallback: 1-year term with 60-day termination notice
      walk_away: No termination for convenience / lock-in over 2 years
      risk_weight: 3
      source_doc_ids: []
    confidentiality:
      id: CONF-GEN-SUP-1
      preferred: Mutual; 2–3 year term; defined categories; standard exclusions (public
        domain, independently developed, rightfully received)
      fallback: Mutual; up to 5 years; residuals clause acceptable if narrowly scoped
      walk_away: One-sided; perpetual/indefinite obligation; overbroad scope (e.g.
        covers information 'whether or not disclosed or marked' or presumed confidential);
        no standard exclusions
      risk_weight: 3
      source_doc_ids: []
    indemnification:
      id: IND-GEN-SUP-1
      preferred: Mutual indemnification for own negligence/breach; consequential and
        punitive damages excluded
      fallback: Mutual indemnity, capped, with carve-outs for gross negligence; excludes
        indirect/consequential/punitive damages
      walk_away: One-sided or uncapped indemnification, or indemnity that sweeps in
        consequential/indirect/punitive damages
      risk_weight: 4
      source_doc_ids: []
    ip_ownership:
      id: IP-GEN-SUP-1
      preferred: Each party retains ownership of its own pre-existing IP and confidential
        information; no license granted beyond what is needed to perform
      fallback: Limited, revocable, non-exclusive, non-transferable license strictly
        for the stated purpose and term
      walk_away: Any perpetual, irrevocable, worldwide, sublicensable, royalty-free,
        or commercial-exploitation license over the other party's IP or confidential
        information
      risk_weight: 5
      source_doc_ids: []
    governing_law:
      id: GL-GEN-SUP-1
      preferred: Governed by our home jurisdiction; courts of our principal place
        of business
      fallback: A neutral, well-established jurisdiction (e.g. New York or Delaware)
      walk_away: Exclusive jurisdiction in the counterparty's home forum with no neutral
        alternative
      risk_weight: 2
      source_doc_ids: []
- id: general_customer
  label: General (customer)
  side: customer
  positions:
    payment_terms:
      id: PT-GEN-CUST-1
      preferred: Net 15 end-of-month
      fallback: Net 30 end-of-month
      walk_away: Over 45 days or milestone-contingent
      risk_weight: 4
      source_doc_ids: []
    limitation_of_liability:
      id: LL-GEN-CUST-1
      preferred: Cap = 12 months fees paid; mutual
      fallback: Cap up to 24 months with mutual carve-outs
      walk_away: Customer liability uncapped while ours is capped, or liability that
        sweeps in consequential/indirect/punitive damages
      risk_weight: 5
      source_doc_ids: []
    term_and_termination:
      id: TT-GEN-CUST-1
      preferred: 1-year term with 30-day termination for convenience
      fallback: 1-year term with 60-day termination notice
      walk_away: No termination for convenience / auto-renew lock-in over 2 years
      risk_weight: 3
      source_doc_ids: []
    confidentiality:
      id: CONF-GEN-CUST-1
      preferred: Mutual NDA; 3-year post-termination obligation; standard exclusions
      fallback: Mutual NDA; up to 5 years; carve-outs for independently developed
        IP
      walk_away: One-sided; perpetual obligation with no carve-outs for public domain;
        overbroad scope (e.g. 'whether or not disclosed or marked')
      risk_weight: 3
      source_doc_ids: []
    indemnification:
      id: IND-GEN-CUST-1
      preferred: Mutual indemnification for own negligence/breach; consequential and
        punitive damages excluded
      fallback: Mutual indemnity, capped, excludes indirect/consequential/punitive
        damages
      walk_away: One-sided or uncapped indemnity, or indemnity that sweeps in consequential/indirect/punitive
        damages
      risk_weight: 4
      source_doc_ids: []
    ip_ownership:
      id: IP-GEN-CUST-1
      preferred: Each party retains ownership of its own pre-existing IP; the other
        party receives only the license expressly needed to use the deliverables
      fallback: Limited, non-exclusive license for the stated purpose and term
      walk_away: Any perpetual, irrevocable, worldwide, sublicensable, royalty-free,
        or commercial-exploitation license over the other party's IP or confidential
        information
      risk_weight: 5
      source_doc_ids: []
    governing_law:
      id: GL-GEN-CUST-1
      preferred: Governed by our home jurisdiction; courts of our principal place
        of business
      fallback: A neutral, well-established jurisdiction (e.g. New York or Delaware)
      walk_away: Exclusive jurisdiction in the counterparty's home forum with no neutral
        alternative
      risk_weight: 2
      source_doc_ids: []
- id: nda_standalone
  label: NDA (mutual)
  side: supplier
  positions:
    confidentiality:
      id: CONF-NDA-1
      preferred: Mutual; 2-year term; defined categories of Confidential Information;
        standard exclusions (public domain, independently developed, rightfully received);
        no residuals clause
      fallback: Mutual; up to 3-year term; residuals clause acceptable if narrowly
        scoped
      walk_away: One-sided; perpetual/indefinite confidentiality; overbroad scope
        (e.g. covers information 'whether or not disclosed or marked' or presumed
        confidential in perpetuity); no standard exclusions
      risk_weight: 3
      source_doc_ids: []
    indemnification:
      id: IND-NDA-1
      preferred: No indemnification, or narrowly mutual solely for breach of confidentiality
      fallback: Mutual indemnity, capped, excludes indirect/consequential/punitive
        damages
      walk_away: Uncapped or one-sided indemnity, or indemnity that sweeps in consequential/indirect/punitive
        damages
      risk_weight: 5
      source_doc_ids: []
    ip_ownership:
      id: IP-NDA-1
      preferred: Disclosing party retains all rights to its Confidential Information;
        no license granted beyond evaluating the stated Purpose
      fallback: Limited, revocable, non-transferable license to use disclosed information
        solely for the stated Purpose
      walk_away: Any perpetual, irrevocable, worldwide, sublicensable, royalty-free,
        or commercial-exploitation license over a party's Confidential Information
        (beyond use for the stated Purpose)
      risk_weight: 5
      source_doc_ids: []
